title: pick up!
description: items you collect stack into shulkers/bundles in your inventory and go right into containers in your off hand!
body:
> **please leave any feedback, including bug reports and suggestions, on the [issues page](https://github.com/gamemode-3/pick-up-1.21.5/issues/)!**
--- tweaks inventory management to make it less painful! i recommend combining this mod with **[easy shulker boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes)** # FEATURES ### pick up into containers - items stack on to unfinished stacks in shulkers and bundles in your inventory - if your inventory is full, items can pick up into empty slots in containers - when holding a container in your hand / off hand, any item you pick up will go into that container ### pick item from containers - pick item (middle mouse button) will now retrieve items from containers in your inventory! ### settings *credits to ***[simple config](https://github.com/magistermaks/fabric-simplelibs/tree/master/simple-config)*** and ***[kaupenjoe](https://github.com/Tutorials-By-Kaupenjoe/Fabric-Tutorial-1.17.1/tree/28-simpleConfigs)*** for the framework! additional download ***not*** required* each of the points above is changeable with a setting for bundles and shulker boxes separately! settings can be modified in `.minecraft/config/pick-up-config.properties` after starting minecraft once. on a server, the server's configs will apply. > **[how to find `.minecraft`?](https://minecraft.wiki/w/.minecraft)**
